meaning: adj.气喘声的 <俚>老生常谈的
examples: I sound like a wheezy, lisping drunk.
I pull the wheezy bell of their shuttered cottage: and wait.
All the children used inhalers to treat the symptoms when they felt wheezy.
Later, I sometimes thought he was selfish, definitely old school, racing toward his own moment, which he always gained with a wheezy shout.
